title: Synthesizing counter using LUT4 and CARRY

features.name: feedback_counter_with_ice40_primitives
features.description: Code should include a feedback counter using ice40 primitives (SB_LUT4, SB_CARRY, SB_DFFE) where the adder output feeds back through a register

features.name: constant_concatenation_feedback_optimization
features.description: Code should include a concatenation using constant values like {1'b0,1'b1} in a feedback path where the result feeds back through a register
